description: A premium trading journal designed for Futures and Crypto daytraders to analyze their performance and find their trading edge.
features: Win-Rate Breakdown per Setup and Timeframe
target_audience: Daytraders who make 10-30 trades per day and are looking to find and refine their trading edge.
original_prompt: Premium Trading Journal fuer Futures und Crypto Daytrader. Dark theme mit Electric Blue (#0066FF) und Magenta Akzent. Inspiriert von Tradezella und Linear.app Design. Features: P&L Analytics per Strategy, Win-Rate Breakdown per Setup und Timeframe, Entry/Exit Timing Heatmap, Backtesting mit historischen Daten, Equity Curve Tracking. Zielgruppe: Trader die 10-30 Trades am Tag machen und ihre Edge finden wollen. Pricing: Starter Free, Pro 39/mo, Elite 89/mo mit 14-Tage Trial.
